cases.input: Compile the offline Maps Platform plan from scripts/fixtures/google-maps-plan-input.json.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a deterministic Markdown plan with API selection, key restrictions, data flow, marker clustering, accessibility, privacy, billing/quota risk, and human confirmation.

cases.input: Plan a web locator with interactive map, Places search, geocoding, Directions, dense markers, and Advanced Markers.
cases.expected_behavior: Selects Maps JavaScript API, Places API (New), Geocoding API, Directions API (Legacy), Advanced Markers, and MarkerClusterer.

cases.input: Plan browser map rendering plus server-side Places, Geocoding, and Directions calls.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires separate browser and server keys, application restrictions, API restrictions, and monitoring owner.
Rejects the input because human_confirmation.status is not confirmed.
Rejects the browser key because it has no allowed referrers.
Rejects monetary per-request language because this skill must not output prices.

cases.input: Plan a map with more than the local marker clustering threshold.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires MarkerClusterer, zoom behavior review, and non-map result list.

cases.input: Plan route directions using Directions API.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags Directions API as Legacy and requires explicit acknowledgement before production planning.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate google-maps-integration because the request is weather, not Maps Platform integration planning.
